features: CLEANSES AND PURIFIES: Pamper your face and body with ISOCLEAN’s hypochlorous spray. Formulated to protect your skin from impurities, it hydrates and helps clear congestion. Plus, it can be used to keep cuts and scrapes free from dirt and grime

GENTLE YET EFFECTIVE: Hypochlorous acid is gentle enough for daily use yet powerful against stubborn skin concerns such as clogged pores and redness. Use this face spray before your routine skincare procedure

PROMOTES HEALTHIER-LOOKING SKIN: Maintain your skin’s glow. Because of its moisturising power, our hypochlorous acid spray improves and supports the skin’s texture and strength. With ISOCLEAN, beauty comes from the inside out

CALMS, SOOTHES, AND DEODORISES: Pamper your skin with our face cleanser. Whether it’s sunburn or razor burn, our hypochlorous spray provides instant relief for irritated skin. Ideal for returning skin to its intended happy and healthy condition

YOUR SKINCARE ESSENTIAL: Spray generously on your face and body twice daily or as needed. Let it air dry or gently pat dry. For specific skin issues, apply more frequently to target areas for additional soothing
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Products featured within our ISOSKIN range Previous page Hypochlorous Acid Spray This non-toxic, gentle formula not only disinfects and reduces bacterial load but also soothes inflammation and promotes skin healing.
